race.description: Marty Nelson Refrigeration & AC CB Hcp (Bm58)
race.comment: DE JOKER (4) recorded a strong maiden win over 1200m at Bathurst last time, scoring with plenty in hand. Has been kept for this and is sparingly raced. Has more to offer and can make it two on the trot. RIVER ROGUE (10) came from well back on the turn to score last time out at Narromine. All set to run well. TORENDOSETTA (5) also turned in a fine effort to win by a long neck at the course and distance last start. No reason she can't be there at the finish again. POWDERFINGER (12) ran a better race last start, finishing a close fourth at Narromine. Well placed and can figure in the finish this time.
